item.name: Apocryphal Bahamut Horn
item.description: When blown, this horn of bone emits an unbridled tone that calls your apocryphal Bahamut to your side.

mount.name: Apocryphal Bahamut
mount.action: Summon forth your apocryphal Bahamut, an embodiment of the fallen wyrm's burning desire to be free...and apparently carry you on a sofa.
mount.description: This draconic entity is brought forth by blowing into the horn you received from the wandering minstrel while holding in your heart Bahamut's song recorded by the Heimdall. Thus imbued with hopes and dreams, it desires nothing more than to soar the boundless skies and recognizes your free-spirited self as its master.
mount.tooltip:
Let me examine it, that I might
ascertain its authenticity.
- Oboro
